trycatch.timeout_catch_order: catch (OperationCanceledException) when (timeoutSource.IsCancellationRequested) MUST precede plain catch (OperationCanceledException)
trycatch.operation_cancelled_rethrow: throw; — must never be wrapped in any exception type
trycatch.timeout_exception_treatment: dependency failure — convert to TimeoutException and wrap via CreateAndLogDependencyException

token_propagation.throw_if_cancellation_requested: cancellationToken.ThrowIfCancellationRequested() must be called before executing dependency or long-running operations (tsc-csharp-cp-017)
